title: Ancient Technology
description: Scientists found a way to create Ancient items we mean uncraftable items
body:
Scientists have recently found a way to create and syntethisize Uncraftable items such as
- Dragon Egg , Totem of Undying , Elytra , Dragon Head

- More in the future.


This mod works best with `ProjectE`\
I suggest using JEI to see the recipes for everything.

And also thanks to Mcreator because without that i would not create this mod since programming is kinda Hard\
If your'e using too Mcreator and want to use one of my items contact me and i would happy like to help you\
If you want to contact me on discord my name is > **NGeorge#5042**


This mod won't be and will never be ported to Fabric since this is Mcreator but there is a way And i im lazy to port it so NO. but if you are willing to to just do it and dm me so i can put it here for people that wants the fabric edition.\
Downgrading versions will not be available so don't ask.
